console_commands.description: Console commands available in the stock unmodded PC version of the game. Access console by pressing ~ (tilde) key (left of 1, above Tab).

commands.effect: Lists every console command available in DOOM Eternal
Binds a command to a specific key (e.g., 'bind k kill' makes 'k' kill your character)
Classic god mode - impervious to all damage and death
Grants specified item or weapon (e.g., BFG from Level 1)
Clears current level of all enemies (peaceful stroll mode)

collectible_cheats.description: DOOM Eternal cheat codes must be found in specific levels first, then accessed through the mission select menu. Found cheats remain unlocked for all playthroughs.

cheats.name: All Runes
cheats.effect: Unlocks every rune in the game
cheats.notes: Runes provide passive bonuses like faster weapon switching, longer glory kill windows

cheats.name: Famine Mode
cheats.effect: Killed demons drop no health or armor pickups

cheats.name: Fully Upgraded Suit
cheats.effect: Every Praetor Suit Perk is available and unlocked
cheats.notes: Includes dash, double jump upgrades, etc.

cheats.name: IDDQD
cheats.notes: Classic DOOM reference - provides damage protection similar to god mode

cheats.name: IDKFA
cheats.effect: All weapons unlocked and fully mastered, all equipment unlocked
cheats.notes: Classic DOOM reference (ID Keys Full Ammo)

cheats.name: Instant Stagger Mode
cheats.effect: Regular enemies stagger immediately when hit with appropriate weapon/effect

cheats.name: Party Mode
cheats.effect: Demons burst into confetti when gibbed

cheats.name: Powerup Mode: Berserk
cheats.notes: Does not work on all levels

cheats.name: Powerup Mode: Onslaught
cheats.notes: Also unlockable by purchasing all Praetor Suit perks

cheats.name: Powerup Mode: Overdrive
cheats.notes: Also unlockable by purchasing all Praetor Suit perks

cheats.name: Silver Bullet Mode
cheats.effect: Staggered demons die instantly from any attack
cheats.notes: Combine with Instant Stagger for instant kills

platform_notes.PC: Console commands available via ~ key; collectible cheats same as console
platform_notes.PlayStation: Console commands not available; collectible cheats found in levels
platform_notes.Xbox: Console commands not available; collectible cheats found in levels
platform_notes.Nintendo Switch: Console commands not available; collectible cheats found in levels

limitations: Console commands locked behind PC version only
Collectible cheats must be found before use
Some powerup cheats don't work on all levels
Activating cheats disables weapon mastery progression
Cheats do not disable Slayer Gates progress

doom_battlemode.note: Battlemode multiplayer does not support cheats
